rationale: Cell rendering wraps active content in -active sub-section and adds parallel -proposed sub-section gated on proposedImpactMatrix lookup. All unsuffixed testIds preserved on outer elements; existing assertions use toContainText/href which still pass through the new <span>/<div> wrappers.

findings.summary: AC1/AC2 satisfied: both sub-sections rendered with all 7 inner testIds (decision/reason/approvalRole/redactedFields/deniedFields/diagnostic/explainHref) suffixed correctly per side.
AC3 satisfied: unsuffixed testIds remain on the outer wrapper elements in the active section; existing policy-authoring.spec.ts uses toContainText which traverses descendants.

AC4 satisfied: when proposedCell is undefined, the columns class is omitted, the active label is hidden, and the -proposed sub-section is not rendered. Two extra structural divs are added but carry no visual styling without the .impact-cell-columns class.
AC5: execution result.json reports status=success, exit_code=0 for the codex run, indicating typecheck/lint/e2e gates passed.
